effect.name: Diode Processor
effect.description:
Diode Processor (LADSPA 1185)
Mangles the signal as if it had been passed through a diode rectifier network. You should probably follow this with a DC Offset Remover, unless you want the offset.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Mode
parameter.comment:
The Mode parameter is
continuously variable from thru to half-wave (1) rectification to full-wave (2) to silence (0)
